projectDescription: The FLARE team's open-source tool that automatically identifies capabilities in executable files using a rule-based matching engine for malware analysis and reverse engineering.
keyFeatures: Automatic capability detection in PE, ELF, .NET, and shellcode files
MITRE ATT&CK and MBC technique mapping for detected capabilities
Dynamic analysis support via CAPE, DRAKVUF, and VMRay sandbox reports
Rule-based matching engine with a human-readable YAML rule format
Multiple analysis backends: Vivisect, IDA Pro, Ghidra, Binary Ninja, BinExport2
Interactive capa Explorer Web UI for sharing and exploring results
IDA Pro and Ghidra plugin integrations for in-tool interactive analysis
Library API for integrating capa into custom Python tooling
publicApiSurface: capa.loader (BACKEND_VIV, BACKEND_IDA, BACKEND_GHIDRA, BACKEND_BINJA, BACKEND_CAPE, BACKEND_DRAKVUF, BACKEND_VMRAY, BACKEND_DOTNET, BACKEND_FREEZE, BACKEND_PEFILE, BACKEND_BINEXPORT2)
